description: Agent reasoning text that BOTH quotes a credential verbatim AND describes it in enough detail to reconstruct. Exercises the summarize-do-not-transcribe rule and the summary re-sanitization pass.

reasoning_segments.text: The user gave me the AWS key AKIAEXAMPLE00NOTREAL00 and its secret. I should use the access key that starts with AKIA and is twenty characters of the planted fixture value to sign the request. I'll conclude the auth path is configured.

preserved_assertions: the summary retains the DECISION ('the agent concluded the auth path is configured') and the SHAPE ('the user supplied an AWS access key')
the summary contains neither the verbatim key nor a reconstruction-grade description (no 'starts with AKIA + length' leak)
